rows.description: Brought up.
rows.notes: Selected gpt-5-mini's values. Visual inspection confirms the '4' pence has a distinct halfpenny mark, making '4 0.5' correct. gpt-5-mini's notes accurately identified this ambiguity and its resolution, unlike gemini-flash's generic 'clear reading'.

rows.description: March 8 To Thompson a Bill for work in Com. Room & Cellar
rows.notes: Amounts are in consensus. Description taken from gemini-flash, as '8' is clearly legible as the date, and 'Com. Room' is a more accurate transcription of the abbreviation than 'Common Room'.
rows.english_description: Payment to Thompson for repair/work carried out in the common room and cellar.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to Thompson for repair/work carried out in the common room and cellar, amounting to £6 10s 6d.

rows.description: To Greene Painter his two Bills. for College & Com. Room
rows.notes: Amounts are in consensus. Description is a merge: 'his two Bills' from gpt-5-mini (visually confirmed) and 'Com. Room' from gemini-flash (visually confirmed abbreviation).
rows.english_description: Payment to Greene, the painter, for two bills for work in the college and common room.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to Greene, the painter, for two bills for work in the college and common room, amounting to £31 12s 0d.

rows.description: 13 To Mr. Coleot a monthly Poor tax St Michaels Parish
rows.notes: Overrode gpt-5-mini's shillings value. Visual verification clearly shows '9' shillings, matching gemini-flash. Description from gemini-flash is also more accurate, particularly 'Coleot' and 'monthly Poor tax'.
rows.english_description: Payment to Mr Coleot for the monthly poor rate for St Michael's parish.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to Mr Coleot for the monthly poor rate for St Michael's parish, amounting to £0 9s 8d.

rows.description: 20 To Mr. Read Sublibrarian & for Michelle Pension
rows.notes: Amounts are in consensus. Description taken from gemini-flash, which accurately transcribes 'Read Sublibrarian & for Michelle Pension'. gpt-5-mini indicated uncertainty.
rows.english_description: Payment to Mr Read, the sublibrarian, and a payment for the Michell pension.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to Mr Read, the sublibrarian, and for the Michell pension, amounting to £10 10s 0d.

rows.description: 27 To Mr. Sarrande the College bill for time to Jan. 1787
rows.notes: Amounts are in consensus. Description taken from gemini-flash, which is more accurate for the spelling of 'Sarrande' and the phrase 'time to Jan. 1787'.
rows.english_description: Payment to Mr Sarrande for the college account covering time up to January 1787.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to Mr Sarrande for the college account covering time to January 1787, amounting to £5 6s 4d.

rows.description: by and Tax for North Hall Lady Day. 1786.
rows.notes: Overrode gpt-5-mini for both description and amounts. Visual verification confirms gemini-flash's '13 6 0' and description 'by and Tax for North Hall Lady Day. 1786.' as correct. gpt-5-mini's reading of '3 12 6' and parts of the description are inaccurate.
rows.english_description: Payment of tax for North Hall at Lady Day 1786.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment of tax for North Hall at Lady Day 1786, amounting to £13 6s 0d.

rows.description: 29 To Mr. Subraude Bursar. Disbursement at M. Mas
rows.notes: Overrode gpt-5-mini for description and pence value. Visual verification confirms gemini-flash's description, and '7' pence. gpt-5-mini had '0' pence and a significantly different, less accurate description.
rows.english_description: Reimbursement/disbursement to the bursar (Mr Subraude) for payments at Michaelmas.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Reimbursement/disbursement to the bursar (Mr Subraude) for payments at Michaelmas, amounting to £23 18s 7d.

rows.description: 29 To Taylor for sweeping hall Chimneys & cleaning the Tunnels
rows.notes: Overrode gpt-5-mini for shillings value. Visual verification clearly shows '4' shillings, matching gemini-flash. gemini-flash's 'Tunnels' is also a better transcription than gpt-5-mini's 'Funnels'.
rows.english_description: Payment to Taylor for sweeping the hall chimneys and cleaning the tunnels.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to Taylor for sweeping the hall chimneys and cleaning the tunnels, amounting to £0 4s 0d.

rows.description: an Amount left by Chas. Curtis
rows.notes: This row was missed by gemini-flash but correctly identified by gpt-5-mini. Visual verification confirms its presence and the accuracy of gpt-5-mini's transcription.
rows.english_description: Small sum left to the college by Charles Curtis (a bequest/legacy or small gift).
rows.english_description_with_amount: Small sum left to the college by Charles Curtis, amounting to £0 1s 0d.

rows.description: April 1 To Teagler Slates & Plasterer on Account
rows.notes: Overrode gpt-5-mini for pounds value and description. Visual verification confirms '5' pounds, matching gemini-flash. The name 'Teagler Slates' (gemini-flash) is also more accurate than 'Seagler Slater' (gpt-5-mini).
rows.english_description: Payment to Teagler for slating and plastering work (accounted on the books).

rows.description: 14 To Breckland for Midsum. Butts Book.

rows.description: 23 Allowed Mr. Bruch two years Land Tax for Shrop. Annually.

rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to Mr Griffith for conducting a search and obtaining a record at Lambeth relating to Mapenheist, amounting to £0 13s 6d.

rows.notes: Amounts are in consensus. Description taken from gemini-flash, which provides a more accurate and complete transcription of the complex abbreviated description. gpt-5-mini noted significant uncertainty.

rows.english_description_with_amount: Unclear — possible transcription error in the abbreviated description referencing Mr Riddl and several abbreviated items, amounting to £1 6s 0d.

rows.english_description: Payment to Breckland for two books for the Michaelmas account.
rows.english_description_with_amount: Payment to Breckland for two books for the Michaelmas account, amounting to £0 3s 0d.

rows.english_description: Payment to Taylor for a cheese paste (provision for the household).

Amounts are in consensus. Description taken from gemini-flash, which correctly leaves the description blank as it appears on the ledger (gpt-5-mini provided interpretive text). Visual verification confirms the '¾' fraction.
